hooks.prompt: A coding task just completed. Check if new code files were written or modified in this session. If yes, suggest in one sentence: 'Run /antivibe to generate a deep-dive learning guide for what was just implemented.' If no meaningful code was written, say nothing.

Session is ending. Check if Claude Code wrote new files or implemented features during this session. If meaningful code was produced, suggest: 'Before you go — run /antivibe to generate deep-dive explanations for the code written this session.' If no code was written, say nothing.
